tasks.title: Codex 호환 진입점 추가

tasks.acceptance: test -f AGENTS.md && grep -q 'AGENTS.md' init.sh && grep -q 'Recommended Codex Workflow' README.md
tasks.section: Week 4 — Codex 호환 환경 구성

tasks.title: Codex harness skills 추가
tasks.dod: .agents/skills 아래 harness 흐름 6종 SKILL.md가 존재하고 init.sh가 새 프로젝트에 복사함
tasks.acceptance: test -f .agents/skills/grill-me/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/harness-plan/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/harness-work/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/harness-review/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/harness-progress/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/harness-sync/SKILL.md && grep -q '.agents/skills' init.sh
tasks.section: Week 4 — Codex 호환 환경 구성

tasks.title: Git workflow helper command/skill 추가
tasks.dod: Claude custom command와 Codex skill로 branch-checkout·git-push·pr-create 절차가 제공되고 init.sh가 복사함
tasks.acceptance: test $(find .claude/commands -name '*.md' | wc -l) -ge 3 && test -f .agents/skills/branch-checkout/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/git-push/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/pr-create/SKILL.md && grep -q '.claude/commands' init.sh
tasks.section: Week 4 — Codex 호환 환경 구성

tasks.title: Claude/Codex 공용 Quality Gate 문서화
tasks.dod: docs/specs/2026-07-08-codex-claude-quality-gates.md와 agents/quality-gates.md가 존재하고 Codex skill, README, BLUEPRINT, AGENTS, init skeleton이 quality gate 기준을 참조함
tasks.acceptance: test -f docs/specs/2026-07-08-codex-claude-quality-gates.md && test -f agents/quality-gates.md && grep -q 'YAGNI' agents/quality-gates.md && grep -q 'caveman' README.md && grep -q 'agents/quality-gates.md' .agents/skills/harness-work/SKILL.md && grep -q 'agents/quality-gates.md' .agents/skills/harness-review/SKILL.md
tasks.section: Week 4 — Codex 호환 환경 구성

tasks.title: rescue-from-main workflow helper 추가
tasks.dod: Claude custom command와 Codex skill로 rescue-from-main 절차가 제공되고 AGENTS·README·BLUEPRINT·init 복사 경로에 등록됨
tasks.acceptance: test -f .agents/skills/rescue-from-main/SKILL.md && test -f .claude/commands/rescue-from-main.md && grep -q 'rescue-from-main' AGENTS.md && grep -q 'rescue-from-main' README.md && grep -q 'rescue-from-main' BLUEPRINT.md
tasks.section: Week 4 — Codex 호환 환경 구성

tasks.title: Task별 .harness 맥락 디렉토리 도입
tasks.dod: .harness/tasks/<task-key>/ 구조와 루트 템플릿 역할이 문서·skeleton·최근 이관 예시로 정리됨
tasks.acceptance: test -d .harness/tasks/4.11-rescue-from-main && test -d .harness/tasks/readme-user-friendly && test -f .harness/tasks/readme-user-friendly/tasks.index.snapshot.json && test -f templates/skeleton/.harness/tasks/.gitkeep && grep -q '템플릿' .harness/STATE.md && grep -q '.harness/tasks' CLAUDE.md && grep -q '.harness/tasks' AGENTS.md && grep -q '.harness/tasks' .agents/skills/harness-work/SKILL.md && python3 scripts/validate_tasks.py && python3 scripts/sync_plans.py --check
tasks.section: Week 4 — Codex 호환 환경 구성
